mapper.select: SELECT a.ocr_anals_result_no, a.ocr_no, a.ocr_file_no, a.left_top_x_axis, a.left_top_y_axis, a.right_bottom_x_axis, a.right_bottom_y_axis, a.track_nm_skip_yn, a.artist_nm_skip_yn, a.artist_matching_yn, c.track_id, c.track_nm, c.track_play_tm, c.adult_auth_need_track_yn, c.track_subtrct_qty, IF(c.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR c.pps_yn ='Y' , 'Y', 'N') AS holdbackYn, c.disp_status_yn, IF(c.title_yn = 'Y' , 'Y', 'N') AS titleYn, c.agency_id, c.free_yn, d.album_id, d.title, d.release_ymd, IF(d.album_tp='MF', '', d.album_tp) AS albumType, f.style_nm AS genreStyle, g.album_img_size AS size, g.album_img_url AS url, h.artist_id, i.artist_nm FROM tb_ocr_anals_result a LEFT JOIN tb_ocr_anals_result_track b ON a.ocr_anals_result_no = b.ocr_anals_result_no AND b.artist_matching_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN ted_album d ON d.album_id = c.album_id AND d.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN d.disp_start_dtime AND d.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN ted_albumstyle e ON e.album_id = d.album_id LEFT JOIN ted_style f ON f.style_id = e.style_id LEFT JOIN tb_album_img g ON g.album_id = d.album_id LEFT JOIN ted_trackartist h ON h.artist_id = d.artist_id AND h.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ted_artist i ON h.artist_id = i.artist_id WHERE a.ocr_no = #{ocrNo}
